TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: The Ventures hya' ga kahul sa Amerika', pins'rux na "唐·威爾森" ru "鮑勃·博格爾" squw 塔科馬 na Amerika' sa kawas tay 1959. The Ventures ga krahul balay mitzyuw nha maki sa mrkyas na 搖滾樂, ana tehok soni ga maki sa 一億張唱片 wal nha tbirul.kawas tay 2008 yasa quw siy say pzyang balay ttrhwan lalu' na 搖滾樂 qu The Ventures. kawas tay 60 ka ray 20 seki' The Ventures sm'ru 電吉他風潮, nanak maki sa gipul wal rema hminas 6000場演出 nha la. Baqul ta kwara sa kahul Taywan ru cyux maki gipul,lalu nya ga "歐陽菲菲" maki qutux 成名曲 nya "雨中徘徊" ga minkbalay lha uzi.
S.PHON: tħe *entures~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa kaħul s~ɕa amerikaʔ, pins~ɕʔrux na "*****" ru "******" s~ɕquw *** na amerikaʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****. tħe *entures~ɕ ɣa kraħul βalaj mitzjuw nħa maki s~ɕa mrkjas~ɕ na ***, ana teħok s~ɕoni ɣa maki s~ɕa ***** wal nħa tβirul.kawas~ɕ taj **** jas~ɕa quw s~ɕij s~ɕaj pzjaŋ βalaj ttrħwan laluʔ na *** qu tħe *entures~ɕ. kawas~ɕ taj ** ka raj ** s~ɕekiʔ tħe *entures~ɕ s~ɕmʔru *****, nanak maki s~ɕa ɣipul wal rema ħminas~ɕ ******* nħa la. βaqul ta kwara s~ɕa kaħul tajwan ru ʦ~ʨjux maki ɣipul,lalu nja ɣa "****" maki qutux *** nja "****" ɣa minkβalaj lħa uzi.
S.FORM: The Ventures hya' ga kahul sa Amerika', pins'rux na "唐·威爾森" ru "鮑勃·博格爾" squw 塔科馬 na Amerika' sa kawas tay 1959. The Ventures ga krahul balay mitzyuw nha maki sa mrkyas na 搖滾樂, ana tehok soni ga maki sa 一億張唱片 wal nha tbirul.kawas tay 2008 yasa quw siy say pzyang balay ttrhwan lalu' na 搖滾樂 qu The Ventures. kawas tay 60 ka ray 20 seki' The Ventures sm'ru 電吉他風潮, nanak maki sa gipul wal rema hminas 6000場演出 nha la. Baqul ta kwara sa kahul Taywan ru cyux maki gipul,lalu nya ga "歐陽菲菲" maki qutux 成名曲 nya "雨中徘徊" ga minkbalay lha uzi.
S.PHON: tħe *entures~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa kaħul s~ɕa amerikaʔ, pins~ɕʔrux na "*****" ru "******" s~ɕquw *** na amerikaʔ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****. tħe *entures~ɕ ɣa kraħul βalaj mitzjuw nħa maki s~ɕa mrkjas~ɕ na ***, ana teħok s~ɕoni ɣa maki s~ɕa ***** wal nħa tβirul.kawas~ɕ taj **** jas~ɕa quw s~ɕij s~ɕaj pzjaŋ βalaj ttrħwan laluʔ na *** qu tħe *entures~ɕ. kawas~ɕ taj ** ka raj ** s~ɕekiʔ tħe *entures~ɕ s~ɕmʔru *****, nanak maki s~ɕa ɣipul wal rema ħminas~ɕ ******* nħa la. βaqul ta kwara s~ɕa kaħul tajwan ru ʦ~ʨjux maki ɣipul,lalu nja ɣa "****" maki qutux *** nja "****" ɣa minkβalaj lħa uzi.
